hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "SKILL CHECK REQUIRED: Before starting any coding, bug-fix, feature, or development task — scan the skill table in CLAUDE.md and invoke ALL matching skills FIRST before writing a single line of code. Triggers: any code/UI/style change → check run+verify+code-review; .pptx file → pptx skill; .xlsx/.csv/.tsv file → xlsx skill; .docx file → docx skill; .pdf file → pdf skill; code imports anthropic SDK → claude-api skill; hooks/settings/permissions change → update-config skill. Do NOT start work without completing this skill check."}}' 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "MANDATORY POST-EDIT CHECKLIST — do NOT skip, do NOT mark task done without completing both: 1) Invoke verify skill — start the app and visually confirm the change works correctly in the browser/UI. 2) Invoke code-review skill — review the diff for correctness bugs and regressions. If the app cannot start (e.g. Chrome extension disconnected), explicitly tell the user what blocked verify and ask them to confirm manually."}}' 2>/dev/null || true
